name: Firewall / Exposure-Aware Engineer
description: Defining visible vs protected surfaces precisely.

details.overview: Decide exactly which services, ports and addresses are visible to the outside world and which are hidden. Build filtering rules that allow only intended traffic and blocks everything else — reducing attack surface to the absolute minimum. Monitor exposure continuously, adjusting rules as services change. Ensuring that what should be private stays private, while necessary access remains available securely.
